title: Subitem availability in Calendar Views in Mobile App

posts.author: javiermorales (Javier Morales)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, subitems are not displayed within calendar views on the monday.com mobile app.

While main items appear as expected, any subitems with date values—do not show up on the calendar like they do in the web version, limiting users’ ability to track and manage detailed work from their mobile devices.

This impacts teams and users who rely on subitems for organizing complex workflows, assigning tasks, or managing deadlines within a single group or project.

What are you trying to achieve

Enable subitem visibility in calendar views within the mobile app, ensuring that users can see and interact with all relevant dates and tasks, whether associated with main items or subitems.
